human-review.evidence: Delegated autonomous drive. Reviewed: 14-REQ spec (coordinator D3 opt-in amendment + 1 revision), app-wide QuickStore opt-in (no schema bump) with live-refresh mirror, main-side needs-you observer over the F5 aggregate, 7-lens review (16 findings incl. a FIVE-lens-confirmed digest-flush-timer contract violation) all resolved + 1 new LOW footgun, TEST-358 CONV-019 narrowing, CONV-036..040 promoted. Residuals: FINDING-011/016 (LOW, documented). Suite 1364 green. Standing backlog: tracked NUL file cleanup.

escalations.reason: Review fan-out: 2 contract blockers + MEDIUM + LOWs, all implement/plan-origin (spec REQ-004 was correct; the impl made the flush lazy). FINDING-005 (five-lens-confirmed: the tumbling-window digest has no timer, strands on quiet elapse), FINDING-006 (pane-reveal forked the MRU/focus-dispatch tail the plan said to share), FINDING-010 (reveal rAF-race: group not mounted on closed->open), FINDING-014 (keyOf newline collision on POSIX), FINDING-015 (digest emit ignores shouldNotify — mute leak), FINDING-012 (Pango markup in notification body on Linux), FINDING-011 (0004 double-notify — LOW). Human decision on the loopback.
escalations.decision: Loop back to tests (delegated). Fixes: FINDING-005 — inject a fakeable timer scheduler (setTimer/clearTimer deps) onto OrkyNeedsYouNotifier; schedule the window-close flush at windowOpenedAt+COALESCE_WINDOW_MS on window open, clear on flush()/dispose(); register.ts supplies real timers; test vector: burst→advance fake clock past window with NO further transition→digest fires once; dispose clears the timer. FINDING-006 — factor the MRU-pick + setActive/setFocusedPane/requestPaneFocus tail into a shared helper both DecisionQueuePanel and pane-reveal call (the quality+DA lenses verified TEST-370 only pins selectPaneCandidates staying in the panel; the tail extraction is frozen-safe). FINDING-010 — make the reveal scroll robust to the closed->open mount (effect keyed on queueOpen+target, or retry until the group element exists), behaviorally pinned. FINDING-014 — keyOf uses a structural/NUL-safe key not newline-join. FINDING-015 — closeWindow re-consults shouldNotify before notifyDigest. FINDING-012 — escape/strip markup in the notification body (Linux Pango). FINDING-011 (LOW, 0004 coexistence double-notify) — accepted residual, documented, candidate for a later cross-coordination feature (do not fix now).

implementer.reason: Loopback fix cycle; A-B degraded to single implementer (codex worktree env failure, documented) — determinism compensated by the frozen determinism vectors + lens.

loopbacks.reason: 2 contract blockers (005 flush-timer, 006 pane-reveal fork) + 010/012/014/015; per ESC-001
